Manually add custom concept mappings

Source: R/improve_mappings.R
add_custom_mapping.Rd

Adds one or more rows to custom_concept_mapping.csv (and optionally custom_ndc_mapping.csv for drug NDC codes). Existing entries for the same source_value + domain are updated in place.

Usage

add_custom_mapping(
  source_value,
  domain,
  concept_id,
  custom_mapping_path = NULL,
  ndc_code = NULL,
  custom_ndc_mapping_path = NULL
)

Arguments

source_value

Character. The source value to map. For drugs, this should be the drug name (not the NDC code), since the CDM load SQL joins custom_concept_mapping on drug_name.

domain

Character. One of "condition", "drug", "measurement", "procedure", "observation".

concept_id

Integer. The OMOP standard concept_id to map to.

custom_mapping_path

Path to the custom_concept_mapping.csv file. Default: from config or package default.

ndc_code

Optional character. For drugs, also write an entry to custom_ndc_mapping.csv with this NDC code.

custom_ndc_mapping_path

Path to the custom_ndc_mapping.csv file. Default: from config or package default.

Value

Invisible TRUE on success.

Usage


# Single mapping
add_custom_mapping("dexamethasone", "drug", 1518254)

# With NDC
add_custom_mapping("dexamethasone", "drug", 1518254, ndc_code = "47202252901")

# Batch - vectorized
add_custom_mapping(
  source_value = c("dexamethasone", "valproic acid", "nifedipine"),
  domain      = "drug",
  concept_id  = c(1518254, 789578, 1318137),
  ndc_code    = c("47202252901", "00093063201", "00047007824")
)

# Non-drug domains
add_custom_mapping("Acute pharyngitis", "condition", 28060)
